/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkes_amcl_sensors.so -o ../../../../../libfawkes_amcl_sensors.so CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_sensors.dir/amcl_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_sensors.dir/amcl_odom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_sensors.dir/amcl_laser.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib:/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/out/build/no-plugin-config -lm /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so ../../../../../libfawkes_amcl_pf.so ../../../../../libfawkes_amcl_map.so -lpthread -lstdc++ -lrt -lm
